hero.title: Find the Right Doctor for Your Health Needs
hero.subtitle: Connect with verified healthcare professionals and book appointments online in minutes.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: We're committed to making healthcare accessible, transparent, and efficient for everyone.

accessible_card.title: Accessible Healthcare
accessible_card.subtitle: We believe everyone deserves easy access to quality healthcare services without barriers.

innovative_card.title: Innovative Solutions
innovative_card.subtitle: We leverage technology to create seamless experiences for patients and healthcare providers.

process.title: How Vitae Works
process.subtitle: Finding and booking appointments with healthcare professionals has never been easier.

first_step.title: Search for Specialists
first_step.subtitle: Find the right healthcare professional by specialty, location, or availability.

second_step.title: Book an Appointment
second_step.subtitle: Select a convenient time slot and book your appointment in just a few clicks.

third_step.title: Visit Your Doctor
third_step.subtitle: Attend your appointment and receive the care you need from qualified professionals.

benefits.title: Why Choose Vitae
benefits.subtitle: Our platform offers unique benefits for patients seeking quality healthcare.

secure_card.title: Secure & Private
secure_card.subtitle: Your personal and medical information is protected with advanced security.

easy_card.title: Easy to Use
easy_card.subtitle: Our intuitive interface makes finding and booking appointments simple.

ratings.title: Doctor Ratings
ratings.subtitle: See what our patients say about our doctors.

hero.title: Transforming Healthcare Access
hero.subtitle: Learn about our mission and the story behind Vitae - the unified medical platform created by ITBA students.

story.title: The Journey of Vitae
story.subtitle: How a group of ITBA students created a platform to revolutionize healthcare access.

text.paragraph_1: Vitae was born in 2025 at the Instituto Tecnológico de Buenos Aires (ITBA) when a group of passionate engineering students identified a critical gap in healthcare accessibility in Latin America.
text.paragraph_2: What started as a university project for the Programming of Web Applications (PAW) course quickly evolved into a comprehensive platform with a mission to connect patients with healthcare providers seamlessly and efficiently.
text.paragraph_3: Our team of dedicated professionals works tirelessly to improve the platform and expand our services to reach more communities, driven by our commitment to innovation, accessibility, and quality healthcare for all.

vision.title: What Drives Us Forward
vision.subtitle: Our core mission and the values that guide our work every day.

accessibility_card.title: Accessibility
accessibility_card.text: We believe healthcare should be accessible to everyone, regardless of location or socioeconomic status. Our platform breaks down barriers to quality medical care.

quality_card.title: Quality Care
quality_card.text: We are committed to connecting patients with verified, high-quality healthcare providers who deliver exceptional care and service.

innovation_card.title: Innovation
innovation_card.text: We constantly evolve our platform with cutting-edge technology to improve the healthcare experience for both patients and providers.

values.title: The Principles That Guide Us
values.subtitle: Core values that shape our decisions and drive our mission forward.

patient_card.title: Patient-Centered Care
patient_card.text: We put patients first in everything we do, ensuring their needs, preferences, and experiences guide our platform development.

trust_card.title: Trust & Security
trust_card.text: We maintain the highest standards of data security and privacy, earning the trust of both patients and healthcare providers.

community_card.title: Community Impact
community_card.text: We strive to make a positive difference in communities by improving healthcare access and outcomes.

forward_card.title: Forward Thinking
forward_card.text: We embrace innovation and continuously seek new ways to improve healthcare delivery through technology.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
